Business & Conferences

Where Deals Are Made 

Six configurable spaces, enterprise-grade AV and a dedicated events team that runs your day like clockwork — from boardroom to 220-seat auditorium.

Six Spaces

Configured for Every Agenda

Up to 12

The Boardroom

An intimate C-suite room with a marble table, 4K conferencing and a private butler.

Up to 60

Summit Hall

A flexible hall for workshops and town halls, with modular staging and daylight.

Up to 220

Grand Auditorium

Tiered seating, a full stage and broadcast-grade AV for launches and conferences.

Up to 30

Business Lounge

A members-style lounge for networking, breakouts and all-day refreshments.
